titles.title: Holy Spirit Come We Cry Out to You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We need You, we love You We long for You Come fill us with Your power Our hearts renew

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let Your kingdom come Let Your will be done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come, Holy Spirit move We cry out to You, we cry out, Lord Holy Spirit come, Holy Spirit move We cry out to You, we cry out, Lord Holy Spirit come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come and fill this place with Your glory, Jesus Come and fill this place with Your power, Jesus Come and fill this place with Your presence, Jesus Come and fill this place, pour it out, Lord Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come, Holy Spirit move We cry out to You, we cry out, Lord Holy Spirit come, Holy Spirit move We cry out to You, we cry out, Lord
